summary: The user inquired about the best time to visit the orangutan rehabilitation center in Kalimantan, receiving advice on peak season travel tips, tour durations, and guidelines for respectful visits. The user expressed excitement about the trip and sought recommendations for reliable tour operators.
facts: The best time to visit the orangutan rehabilitation center in Kalimantan is between July and September during the dry season. Tours of the orangutan rehabilitation center in Kalimantan typically last from half a day to a few days, with day tours averaging 6-8 hours. The user is planning to visit the orangutan rehabilitation center in Kalimantan during peak season. The user is interested in finding a reliable and well-reviewed tour operator for their visit. The user wants to ensure they respect the animals and their environment while visiting the rehabilitation center. Guidelines for visiting the orangutan rehabilitation center include maintaining a safe distance from the orangutans and not feeding or touching them.
